experiment_types: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

publications.ref: Tammsalu T, Matic I, Jaffray EG, Ibrahim AF, Tatham MH, Hay RT; Proteome-wide identification of SUMO2 modification sites., Sci Signal, 2014 Apr 29, 7, 323, rs2,

Characteristics[MaterialType].evidence: 6His-SUMO2T90K modifed proteins from human cell lysates

Characteristics[Label].evidence: expression of polyhistidine (6His)-tagged SUMO2 with Thr90 mutated to Lys

Characteristics[GeneticModification].evidence: 6His-tagged SUMO2 with Thr90 mutated to Lys

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].value: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry

Characteristics[CellLine].reasoning: PRIDE database indicates Hek-293 cell, and human cell lysates from abstract suggest cultured cell line usage
Characteristics[CellLine].needs: Methods section to confirm exact cell line used

Characteristics[OrganismPart].reasoning: PRIDE database shows cell suspension culture, consistent with cell lysates mentioned in abstract
Characteristics[OrganismPart].needs: Methods section to confirm culture conditions

STEP1_OVERVIEW.summary: 論文は6His-tagged SUMO2 T90K変異体を用いたヒト細胞のSUMO2修飾部位の網羅的解析。アフィニティ精製-MS法により1000以上の修飾サイトを同定。PRIDEデータベースからHEK293細胞の使用が示唆されるが、論文テキストからは確定できない。Methods部での細胞株と培養条件の確認が必要。

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: digested for 16 hours with Lys-C (Wako) in 50 μl IP buffer at 37 °C (enzyme to protein ratio 1:50)

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].1.evidence: Peptides retained on the filter units were subsequently digested with endoproteinase Glu-C for 16 hours in 50 μl of IP buffer at 20°C (enzyme to protein ratio 1:100)

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: treated with 50 mM chloroacetamide in UA buffer for 20 minutes in the dark

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: cell lysis buffer (6 M guanidinium-HCl, 100 mM sodium phosphate buffer pH 8.0, 10 mM Tris-HCl, 20 mM imidazole, 5 mM β-mercaptoethanol)

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: Carbamidomethylation of Cys was set as a fixed modification

Characteristics[Modification].1.evidence: oxidation of Met, acetylation of protein N-termini, phosphorylation of Ser, Thr, and Tyr, and diGly adduction to Lys (except in peptide C-terminus) were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].2.evidence: oxidation of Met, acetylation of protein N-termini, phosphorylation of Ser, Thr, and Tyr, and diGly adduction to Lys (except in peptide C-terminus) were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].3.evidence: oxidation of Met, acetylation of protein N-termini, phosphorylation of Ser, Thr, and Tyr, and diGly adduction to Lys (except in peptide C-terminus) were set as variable modifications

Characteristics[Modification].4.evidence: oxidation of Met, acetylation of protein N-termini, phosphorylation of Ser, Thr, and Tyr, and diGly adduction to Lys (except in peptide C-terminus) were set as variable modifications

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].evidence: Nickel affinity purification of 6His-SUMO2T90K conjugates was performed with Ni2+-NTA agarose beads (Qiagen)

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].1.evidence: Enrichment of diGly-Lys containing peptides with anti-KεGG was performed according to a published protocol

Comment[Separation].evidence: Purified peptides were loaded onto 75 μm × 500 mm EASY-Spray column (Thermo Scientific) at a maximum pressure of 800 bars and various gradient lengths from 90 minutes to 150 minutes were used with a linear gradient of 5 % to 22 % of solvent B

STEP2_SAMPLE_PREP.summary: サンプル調製プロトコルが詳細に記載されている。6His-taggedタンパク質のニッケルアフィニティ精製後、Lys-CとGlu-Cによる二段階消化を実施。固定修飾としてカルバミドメチル化、変動修飾として酸化、アセチル化、リン酸化、GlyGly修飾を設定。diGly含有ペプチドの免疫精製による濃縮も実施している。

Comment[Instrument].evidence: analysed by liquid chromatography tandem MS on a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: CONFIRMED FROM PRIDE DATABASE: Fragmentation (from instrument): HCD

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Up to one data dependent MS2 spectrum was acquired

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: CONFIRMED FROM PRIDE DATABASE: Ionization (from instrument): nanoESI

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: CONFIRMED FROM PRIDE DATABASE: MS2 Analyzer (from instrument): orbitrap

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: a mass deviation of 6 parts per million was set for main search

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: A maximum number of three or five missed cleavages were allowed for samples cleaved with Lys-C, or Lys-C and Glu-C, respectively

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: various gradient lengths from 90 minutes to 150 minutes were used

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: Flow rate was set to 250 nl/min

STEP3_MS_SETTINGS.summary: 質量分析装置設定パラメータが詳細に記載されている。Q Exactive装置でHCD断片化、データ依存取得方式を使用。前駆体質量許容誤差6 ppm、フラグメント質量許容誤差0.5 Da。グラデーション時間90-150分、フロー速度250 nl/min。見逃し切断回数は酵素により3回または5回。コリジョンエネルギーのみ記載なし。

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: In the experiment designed to evaluate reproducibility, duplicate 750mL cultures of HEK293 6His-SUMO2T90K corresponding to 4 × 107 cells were processed in parallel.

FactorValue[Treatment].evidence: 6 L of cell culture (~800 000 cells/ml) was stimulated by heat shock at 43 °C

FactorValue[Temperature].evidence: 6 L of cell culture (~800 000 cells/ml) was stimulated by heat shock at 43 °C

FactorValue[Bait].evidence: Nickel affinity purification of 6His-SUMO2T90K conjugates was performed with Ni2+-NTA agarose beads

candidates: gradient time fractions based on T90/T150
enzyme digestion fractions based on lysC/gluC
Comment[FractionIdentifier].reasoning: Raw file names contain T90/T150 tokens (likely gradient times 90-150 min mentioned in previous steps) and lysC/gluC tokens (enzyme digestion types). File naming pattern suggests systematic fractionation.
Comment[FractionIdentifier].needs: Confirmation whether T90/T150 refers to gradient time fractions or other experimental conditions

candidates: files without T1 are first replicate by default
Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].reasoning: Files 20130912_04 and 20130912_09 contain '_T1' suffix, suggesting biological replicate 1. Other files may represent different replicates or first replicate without explicit labeling.
Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].needs: Clarification of T1 suffix meaning and identification of second replicate files

Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].reasoning: 10 raw files present, but may represent technical replicates, fractions, or different experimental conditions rather than independent samples
Characteristics[NumberOfSamples].needs: Understanding of experimental design to distinguish samples from replicates/fractions

STEP4_RAW_FILES.summary: 実験デザインが明確化された。2つの生物学的レプリケートでの再現性評価実験が実施され、43°Cでの熱ショック処理、6His-SUMO2T90K遺伝子改変HEK293細胞の使用が確定。rawファイル名からT90/T150（グラデーション時間）、lysC/gluC（酵素消化）、T1（レプリケート）のトークンが読み取れるが、正確な割り当てには実験デザインの詳細確認が必要。10個のrawファイルの関係性と技術的レプリケート数は未確定。
